Michael Torres

Partner

Los Angeles

Biography

Michael Torres is a partner in the Los Angeles office of Broadline Legal Partners focusing on intellectual property litigation and patent prosecution.

Practice Areas

  • Intellectual Property
  • Patent Litigation
  • Trade Secrets
  • Trademark & Copyright
  • Technology Transactions
  • Licensing
  • International Trade Commission (ITC) Proceedings
